title: Chouchou Refuses to Abandon the Shop
description: On pages 9–12, Chouchou’s loyalty to the pet food shop turns Buggy’s occupation from a pirate threat into a personal wound for the town.
scene: Chouchou refuses to give up the place connected to his owner, while pirates and bystanders react to the dog’s stubborn defense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You!!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Didn't I just deal with you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You should be dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: IT TAKES MORE THAN A LITTLE KICK TO KILL ME!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: I'm a rubber man!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Rubber man? You've got the devil's own luck, boy. But that hit must have scrambled your brains...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You'd have to be crazy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to tangle with me again! Richie, bite his head off!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: It'll take more than that lion...

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: To kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHAT'RE YOU DOING TO YOUR ARMS!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HOW CAN YOU--!?

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: GRMFi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gum- gum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ..GAVE!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Richie!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What are you, you freak!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ALONG TIME AGO, I ATE THE FRUT OF THE GUM-GUM TREE!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: The gum- gum tree?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: You ate the devil's fruit, like Captain Buggy!!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: OKAY, OKAY! I'll give you all the gold you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: J-JUST LET ME APOLO- GIZE AND GO! ALIVE!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's too late for Apollo- Gies...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: THEY WON'T BRING THAT DOG'S TREASURE BACK!

summary: This part makes the conflict emotional: Luffy sees that Buggy’s violence is not abstract, but aimed at things people love and protect.
